## Diagnostics Bundle
**⚠️ REQUIRED: Please attach your diagnostics bundle**

To generate your diagnostics bundle:
1. Open SimplyYTD
2. Go to Settings
3. Click "Generate Diagnostics Bundle"
4. Attach the generated `diagnostics.txt` file to this issue

**Without a diagnostics bundle, this issue will be automatically closed after 7 days if no reproduction is provided.**
